title: BEM-773 verify direct dispatch
objective:
Run script:
"""
sep='\n'
for d in ['governance/state','governance/reports','governance/codex/proofs','governance/transport','governance/tasks/pending','governance/handoff']:
    Path(d).mkdir(parents=True,exist_ok=True)
created='2026-05-21 | 19:25 (UTC+3)'
def load(path):
    p=Path(path)
    if not p.exists(): return {}
    try: return json.loads(p.read_text(encoding='utf-8', errors='ignore'))
    except: return {}
runtime=load('governance/state/claude_inbound_mailbox_workflow_state.json')
watch=load('governance/state/claude_mailbox_minute_watchdog_state.json')
responses=[]
for d in [Path('governance/audit_mailbox/claude_to_gpt'),Path('governance/audit_mailbox/external_auditor_to_internal_auditor')]:
    if d.exists():
        for p in sorted(d.glob('*')):
            if p.is_file():
                txt=p.read_text(errors='ignore')
                low=(p.name+' '+txt).lower(); up=txt.upper()
                if 'bem772' in low or 'bem-772' in low or 'bem732' in low or 'bem-732' in low or 'bem728' in low or 'bem-728' in low or 'multi-agent strategy' in low:
                    decision='MESSAGE'
                    if 'CHANGE_REQUIRED' in up: decision='CHANGE_REQUIRED'
                    elif 'BLOCKED' in up: decision='BLOCKED'
                    elif 'APPROVED' in up or 'DECISION: APPROVE' in up: decision='APPROVED'
                    responses.append({'path':str(p),'decision':decision})
if responses:
    status='claude_response_found_after_direct_dispatch'
    blocker=None
    next_action='process real Claude response'
elif runtime.get('started_at') or runtime.get('completed_at'):
    status='direct_dispatch_runtime_seen_no_response'
    blocker={'code':'CLAUDE_RUNTIME_SEEN_NO_RESPONSE','outcome':runtime.get('claude_action_outcome')}
    next_action='diagnose Claude Action outcome/provider without exposing secrets'
else:
    status='direct_dispatch_not_proven'
    blocker={'code':'DIRECT_DISPATCH_NOT_PROVEN','message':'No runtime state or Claude response is visible after direct dispatch bridge install. Push-based bridge may not fire from Actions-created commit.'}
    next_action='patch codex-runner to dispatch Claude workflow directly using PAT after Codex task completion when Claude mailbox work is active'
pending=Path('governance/tasks/pending/bem773_next_direct_dispatch_repair.md')
pending.write_text('# BEM-773 Next Direct Dispatch Repair'+sep+sep+'Дата: '+created+sep+'Status: '+status+sep+'Next: '+next_action+sep)
handoff=Path('governance/handoff/GPT_NEXT_ACTION.md')
handoff.write_text('# GPT NEXT ACTION | BEM-773 DIRECT DISPATCH RESULT'+sep+sep+'Дата: '+created+sep+'Status: '+status+sep+'Next: '+next_action+sep+'Operator relay: forbidden.'+sep)
state={'schema_version':'verify_direct_dispatch_result.v1','bem':'BEM-773','status':status,'runtime_started_at':runtime.get('started_at'),'runtime_completed_at':runtime.get('completed_at'),'claude_outcome':runtime.get('claude_action_outcome'),'watchdog_status':watch.get('status'),'watchdog_checked_at':watch.get('checked_at'),'responses_found':len(responses),'responses':responses,'next_action':next_action,'blocker':blocker,'created_at':created}
state_file=Path('governance/state/bem773_verify_direct_dispatch_result.json')
state_file.write_text(json.dumps(state,indent=2,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
report=Path('governance/reports/bem773_verify_direct_dispatch_result.md')
report.write_text('# BEM-773 | Verify Direct Dispatch Result | '+status.upper()+sep+sep+'Дата: '+created+sep+'Responses: '+str(len(responses))+sep+'Runtime started: '+str(runtime.get('started_at'))+sep+'Runtime completed: '+str(runtime.get('completed_at'))+sep+'Next: '+next_action+sep+'Blocker: '+('null' if blocker is None else json.dumps(blocker,ensure_ascii=False))+sep)
transport=Path('governance/transport/results.jsonl')
with transport.open('a',encoding='utf-8') as h:
    h.write(json.dumps({'record_type':'bem773_verify_direct_dispatch_result','status':status,'responses_found':len(responses),'runtime_started_at':runtime.get('started_at'),'next_action':next_action,'blocker':blocker,'created_at':created},ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
proof=Path('governance/codex/proofs/bem773_verify_direct_dispatch_result.txt')
proof.write_text('BEM-773 '+status+' responses='+str(len(responses))+'\n')
changed_files.extend([str(pending),str(handoff),str(state_file),str(report),str(transport),str(proof)])
ops_applied.append('Verified whether direct Claude dispatch bridge produced runtime state or response and routed next repair step')
"""
No issue comments.
